description: Unrecognized string regime label: apply_regime_exit_adjustment must return base_ticks unchanged. Future labels or misspelled values must not silently apply an adjustment.

derivation.spec_basis: PHASE3_DECISIONS.md §Regime->response mapping: 'regime absent/unknown/stale -> current behavior (no adjustment).' An unrecognized string is treated as 'unknown'. This ensures forward-compatibility: if a future regime label is added to the classifier but not yet added to the adjustment table, the safe default applies (no change to exit behavior).
derivation.direction: adjusted_ticks == base_ticks (identity for any unrecognized string)
derivation.tolerance_note: Expected value is exactly base_ticks=3. Exact integer equality.

expected.comment: Unrecognized label -> safe default. No exception raised, no adjustment applied.
